source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for durable learning UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for course labels, headings, body copy, and numeric progress rhythm.
layout: Stable 8px grids, shell-plate grouping, calm learning cards, reef navigation, durable progress surfaces, and compact dashboards for repeated study workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent sea turtle motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sea turtle shell motif as a full sea turtle cutout, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A sea turtle profile emphasizing an olive shell with durable geometric shell plates, aqua reef reflected color, reef-sand highlights, accurate reptile anatomy, visible flippers and head, crisp natural edges, slow durable learning system mood.
Composition/framing: centered complete isolated cutout with generous padding; do not crop the shell, head, flippers, tail, or body silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean even studio light that preserves shell texture, olive color, and reef warmth; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no coral landscape, no decorative background, no second turtle, no floor plane, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sea Turtle" derived from the visible transparent sea turtle shell cutout.
Reference use: The light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the olive shell, aqua reef reflections, sand highlights, coral support, shell-plate geometry, and slow durable learning mood in the sea turtle motif.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source composition, crisp readable text, large labels, no tiny dense tables.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Sea Turtle, Sea Turtle Shell, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Learning Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette labels to show: Reef Sand #F3EAD7, Shell Ink #223026, Olive Shell #6F7F3F, Aqua Reef #2F9AA0, Turtle Moss #4F6F42, Coral Sand #D99B76, Shell Plate #D8D0AE, Sea Grass #8D9964, Deep Reef #24434A.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use readable labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, learning course cards, progress charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, shell texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style slow durable learning system, precise grid, 8px card radius, shell-plate grouping, calm reef surfaces, professional product UI board.
Color palette: use only motif-derived olive shell, aqua reef, reef sand, coral sand, sea grass, shell ink, shell plate, and deep reef. Avoid purple/blue gradients and unrelated saturated colors.
Text: all visible text must be short, readable, correctly spelled, and not overlapping. Do not use long paragraphs.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Turtle", no cropped board, no illegible microtext.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Sea Turtle design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sea turtle cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Sea Turtle board as references. Preserve the same palette roles, shell-plate grouping, reef texture, component language, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, 4K-class source composition, crisp readable text, large labels, no tiny dense tables.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Sea Turtle, Sea Turtle Shell, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Learning Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Palette labels to show: Reef Sand #F3EAD7, Shell Ink #223026, Olive Shell #6F7F3F, Aqua Reef #2F9AA0, Turtle Moss #4F6F42, Coral Sand #D99B76, Shell Plate #D8D0AE, Sea Grass #8D9964, Deep Reef #24434A.
Visual details: dark background derived from shell ink and deep reef, readable text from reef sand, primary accents from olive shell, navigation and charts from aqua reef, warm support from coral sand, subtle shell-plate texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; readable labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, learning course cards, progress charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, shell texture samples.
Text: all visible text must be short, readable, correctly spelled, and not overlapping. Do not use long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Turtle", no illegible microtext.
